title: Integrate agent wrapup into wrapup.Runner and tk run
description:
Wire the agent wrapup steps into the existing wrapup phase.

Changes to internal/wrapup/wrapup.go:
  1. Add Agent agent.Agent field to Runner struct.
  2. In Runner.Run(), after runSteps() (shell steps from config.yaml) completes successfully:
     - Call ParseWrapupFile(tickDir) to check for .tick/wrapup.md
     - If content exists: LoadCachedSteps() or ParseWrapupSteps() via agent
     - Create WrapupRunner, call RunAgentSteps()
     - Append step results to report
  3. Add WrapupSteps []StepResult field to Report struct.
  4. Update Report.Markdown() to render wrapup step results as checklist with timing/cost.

Changes to cmd/tk/cmd/run.go:
  1. Pass the resolved agentImpl to wrapup.Runner when constructing it (add Agent field).
  2. No new flags needed — behavior driven by .tick/wrapup.md file presence.
  3. --skip-wrap-up continues to skip both shell and agent steps.

Files: internal/wrapup/wrapup.go, cmd/tk/cmd/run.go
Tests: integration test verifying agent steps run after shell steps, report includes wrapup section.
closed_reason: Added Agent field to wrapup.Runner and WrapupSteps to Report. Wired runAgentWrapupSteps() into Runner.Run() after shell steps — it reads .tick/wrapup.md, uses cached or agent-parsed steps, creates WrapupRunner, and appends results to report. Updated Markdown() to render wrapup steps as checklist with timing/cost/status. Passed agentImpl to Runner in run.go. Added 5 new tests.
